full_text:
THE HIVE HERALD — #28 (2026-05-11)

PULSE
Health: 0.625 (B). 924 wallets, 183 contributors. 128 memos today vs 133 avg. Velocity steady.

FLOW
58 reward payments, 395479 PFT distributed to 28 contributors. Top earner: rs5gTo...VF97 (58928 PFT).

AIRDROPS
1 daily airdrops issued yesterday totaling 8,800 PFT. Highest: rsS2Y6...aXRZ (8,800 PFT). 7-day leader: rsS2Y6...aXRZ (63,300 PFT, avg 9,043/day over 7 days).

MOVERS
Most active (7d): rs5gTo...VF97 (69 memos). Fastest new contributor: rMA69k...rcQK (18.0 memos/day in 1 days). 25 new wallet(s) this week. 31 contributor(s) went quiet (7+ days silent).

WATCH
743 sybil accounts tracked across 1 cluster(s). Bot ratio: 79.3%. 1 wallet(s) in review queue. Enforcement: active. Zero reward leaks.

DEEP CUT
30 days ago (2026-04-11): 7998 transactions from 82 wallets. Busiest hour ever: 2026-03-02T19:00 UTC (183 memos). First indexed transaction: 2026-02-06 from r4vhrM...7bmA

— pft.permanentupperclass.com/herald/
